title: ai-squad Observed Session
description: Canonical contract for the observed-mode Session state at .agent-session/OBS-NNN/session.yml, written by the /observe skill and the attention/cost hooks. Dispatch rule: a session.yml belongs to THIS contract iff it has mode: observed; without that field the contract is session.schema.json (SDD legacy). Directory name (OBS-*) is an id fallback, not the discriminator. Derived from the WRITERS (shared/skills/observe/skill.md + track-attention.py + hook_runtime.register_observed_session + guard-write-scope.py), not from on-disk specimens — deployed hooks may lag the source. Evolution protocol: a new field lands in the same PR as the schema update and the contract tests; readers treat every field as optional on read. NOT enforced at write time; consumers validate on read and treat unknown shapes as drift.

session_id.description: Contract id; must match the .agent-session/<session_id>/ directory name. Observed dialect keeps session_id (not spec_id) by design — frozen 2026-06-12 (OBS-002).

mode.description: Discriminator. Wakes track-attention and the window-sliced cost capture; SDD machines ignore the dir.

intent.description: The human's one-line intent. Cockpit card title.

status.description: Lifecycle. /observe writes in_progress|done|abandoned; track-attention flips needs_attention⇄in_progress mechanically. done/abandoned are terminal.

kind.description: What the session is blocked on. Only 'input' is written in observed mode today.

attention.description: Present ONLY while status=needs_attention; track-attention strips the block when the human engages.

output_locale.description: BCP-47 tag; language of human-facing prose. Absent defaults to en.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC, real clock. Lower bound of the contract's cost window.

closed_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC. Upper bound of the cost window. Present only on terminal close (done AND abandoned).

decisions.description: Best-effort trail appended by the model when a real choice is made. Canonical keys what/why/rejected/ref; items are open (no per-item required) — the trail is best-effort, never load-bearing.

observed_sessions.description: Adoption registry: chat-session ids captured into this contract, appended by the Stop-hook router (register_observed_session). Allow-list for cost scoping.

approved_write_scope.description: Optional à-la-carte write fence (repo-relative paths; directory prefix match). Presence enables guard-write-scope; lifted when status=done.
